verses.1: In the twelfth year, on the first day of the twelfth month, the word of the LORD came to me, saying,
verses.2: “Son of man, take up a lament for Pharaoh king of Egypt and say to him:
verses.16: This is the lament they will chant for her; the daughters of the nations will chant it. Over Egypt and all her multitudes they will chant it, declares the Lord GOD.”
verses.17: In the twelfth year, on the fifteenth day of the month, the word of the LORD came to me, saying,
verses.18: “Son of man, wail for the multitudes of Egypt, and consign her and the daughters of the mighty nations to the depths of the earth with those who descend to the Pit:
